description: Aesop configuration. Precedence: environment variables > config file > built-in defaults.

_paths.aesop_root: Set via AESOP_ROOT env var (no config key)
_paths.brain_root: Override via BRAIN_ROOT env var or config; default: {aesop_root}/../.claude
_paths.scripts_root: Override via SCRIPTS_ROOT env var or config; default: {aesop_root}/../scripts
_paths.temp_root: Override via TEMP_ROOT env var or config; default: system temp + /claude
_paths.state_root: Override via AESOP_STATE_ROOT env var or config; default: {aesop_root}/state
_paths.fleet_root: Override via AESOP_FLEET_ROOT env var or config; default: $HOME (security: validate clone targets remain under this root)
_paths.transcripts_root: Override via AESOP_TRANSCRIPTS_ROOT env var or config; default: ~/.claude/projects
